message:
fix(ui): use indigo color for basket action feedback

The basket swipe action should use indigo (action-specific color) to
provide clear visual feedback when adding to basket. The muted neutral
color is kept for the disabled "already in basket" state.

Fixes:
- Use indigo gradient for "add to basket" swipe reveal
- Use indigo icon color for ShoppingBag in quick actions
- Update JSDoc to match actual color scheme

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ const LONG_PRESS_DELAY = 500; * * Features: * - Swipe left: Copy to clipboard (blue reveal) - * - Swipe right: Add to basket (neutral reveal) + * - Swipe right: Add to basket (indigo reveal) * - Double-tap: Quick save/favorite with heart animation * - Long-press: Opens quick actions menu * - Spring-back animation on incomplete swipe @@ -343,7 +343,7 @@ export function SwipeablePromptCard({ "absolute inset-y-0 left-0 flex items-center justify-start px-6", inBasket ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-neutral-500 to-neutral-600" - : "bg-gradient-to-r from-neutral-700 to-neutral-800", + : "bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-500 to-indigo-600", actionTriggered === "basket" && "from-emerald-500 to-emerald-600" )} style={{ @@ -450,7 +450,7 @@ export function SwipeablePromptCard({ : "bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-800 hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700" )} > - + {inBasket ? "Already in Basket" : "Add to Basket"}
